_comment: Canonical solver-binary manifest. Consumed by dexbtx_miner.solver_updater (binary) and dexbtx_miner.wrapper_updater (the top-level `version` field) on every miner startup. To add a new platform: add an entry under `platforms`. To force-upgrade across a fork boundary: set `min_required_sha256` on the relevant platform entry — a host whose binary != min that cannot download the new one will REFUSE to mine. v1 single-binary schema (top-level sha256+url) is still recognized by the updater as legacy (treated as x86_64-linux); the v2 platforms-dict schema below is preferred.
notes: v0.4.14 — MANDATORY for the MatMul-V3 fork (parent-block-MTP seed binding) that activates at mainnet height 130,500. All Linux/macOS platforms now point at btx-prebuilds-v0.32.10 (BTX v0.32.10 source, tag 4519f0a7). Below 130,500 the V2 path is unchanged (fully backwards compatible); at/after 130,500 anything older than v0.32.10 produces 100% invalid shares, so every platform carries min_required_sha256 to force the upgrade before the fork. Carries our standing build patches (recovery-exit fee-replacement filter, GBT cache, cmake target). KAT-verified: Rust share-validator V3 seed derivation == btxd consensus byte-for-byte (gold-standard test v3_matches_btxd_consensus_reference). arm64-darwin rebuilt from v0.32.10 source. aarch64-linux default now tracks the cuda12 v0.32.10 build (broadest ARM coverage); native sm_121/cuda13 build is published as the aarch64-linux-cuda13 opt-in key.

x86_64-linux.force_upgrade_reason: MatMul-V3 fork at mainnet block 130,500 — pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork.
x86_64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.10 / matmul-v3. CUDA 12.8, native cubins sm_61;sm_75;sm_80;sm_86;sm_89;sm_90;sm_120 (GTX 10-series through RTX 50-series). LTO enabled. Built on home-1070; V3 seed derivation KAT-verified bit-equivalent to btxd consensus.

aarch64-linux.force_upgrade_reason: MatMul-V3 fork at mainnet block 130,500 — pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork.
aarch64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.10 / matmul-v3. CUDA 12.8, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (Ampere through Blackwell consumer). Default ARM entry. CUDA-13-only hosts (GB10/Spark, sm_121) should set DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda13. Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml.

aarch64-linux-cuda12.force_upgrade_reason: MatMul-V3 fork at mainnet block 130,500 — pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork.
aarch64-linux-cuda12.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda12. BTX v0.32.10 / matmul-v3. CUDA 12.8 build, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (no sm_121 — use cuda13 build for GB10/Spark). Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml.

aarch64-linux-cuda13.force_upgrade_reason: MatMul-V3 fork at mainnet block 130,500 — pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork.
aarch64-linux-cuda13.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda13. BTX v0.32.10 / matmul-v3. CUDA 13.0, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120;sm_121. Covers GB10/Spark + RTX Blackwell consumer needing a CUDA-13 runtime. Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml.

arm64-darwin.force_upgrade_reason: MatMul-V3 fork at mainnet block 130,500 — pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork.
arm64-darwin.notes: Apple Silicon Metal backend, rebuilt from BTX v0.32.10 source. CI verifies cpu_digest == metal_digest == reference_digest before publish.
